creator: kick.christoph@googlemail.com
text:
New port: devel/rubygem-rubygame

Rubygame is a game-development extension and library for the ruby
language, with similarities to pygame. The purpose of rubygame is
make the creation of games in the ruby language simple, easy, and
fun, without limiting flexibility.

I figured out that rubygame version in the port devel/ruby-game is obsolete. 

This is a port for the latest version of rubygame. It's a new port because it's using rubygem.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
